sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state after UP 9, RIGHT 4
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("Current objects:")
for node in seg['nodes']:
    if node['color'] in ['B', 'c', 'Y'] and node['pixels'] > 10:
        print(f"  color={node['color']} pixels={node['pixels']} boundary={node['boundary']}")

# Check timer
timer_yellow = 0
for node in seg['nodes']:
    if node['color'] == 'Y' and any(p[1] == 63 for p in node['boundary']):
        timer_yellow = node['pixels']
        break
print(f"\nTimer yellow: {timer_yellow} pixels")
print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")

# Check adjacency
print("\nAdjacency list (gameplay objects only):")
for pair in seg['adjacency_list']:
    i, j = pair
    ci = cj = None
    for node in seg['nodes']:
        if node['id'] == i: ci = node['color']
        if node['id'] == j: cj = node['color']
    if ci in ['B', 'c', 'Y'] or cj in ['B', 'c', 'Y']:
        if ci not in ['b', 'S'] and cj not in ['b', 'S']:  # exclude background
            print(f"  {ci} (id={i}) - {cj} (id={j})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
